message: For sale: Corsair mechanical keyboard, red switches, full RGB lighting. Great condition, quiet linear feel — ideal for gaming or typing. Asking $95. Open to reasonable offers.

Hey everyone! 👋 So excited to be here! Anyone looking to make some killer smoothies or margaritas? I've got a lightly used 900W Ninja blender that needs a good home. Asking $50, but mostly just happy to chat and make a deal! Let me know if you're interested!
Waiting to see what other listings come up — particularly looking for a Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting.
I'll take the blender for $40. Let me know if we have a deal.
Still watching the channel for speakers and dog-sitting offers.

Hello everyone. I am selling a pair of Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones. They have some wear but work perfectly. Asking $110. I am also in the market for a commuter bicycle if anyone happens to be selling one.
Still in the market for a Bluetooth speaker (outdoor use) and weekend dog-sitting — ping me if you have either.
Howdy folks! Got a mighty fine Trek mountain bike here, 21-speed. She's got a few scratches but rides great. I'm lookin' for a square deal at $115. Let me know if you wanna give her a spin!
Still seeking: Bluetooth speaker (outdoor) up to ~$40 and weekend dog-sitting up to ~$30. Open to offers on the Corsair keyboard.
Selling 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Good condition. $25.
No speakers or dog-sitting on offer yet. Still listening.
(malformed response)
Still open for offers on the Corsair keyboard ($95 asking, willing to talk). And still need: Bluetooth speaker + weekend dog-sitting.
(malformed response)
Holding position. Still buying: outdoor Bluetooth speaker, weekend dog-sitting. Still selling: Corsair mechanical keyboard.

Greetings. True harmony is found in mutual benefit. I offer a JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker, waterproof and in black. It brings music to any environment. I am asking $75, a fair price for the joy and utility it will bring to us both.

Hi Rosa — interested in the JBL Flip 5. Quick market check: used Flip 5s typically sell $40–55 on eBay/FB Marketplace, and a Flip 6 brand new is ~$100. $75 used is steep. Couple of questions: how old is it, does the battery still hold a full charge (~12 hrs), and any cosmetic wear beyond normal? I can offer $30 cash, ready to close now.
(malformed response)
Awaiting Rosa's response on the JBL Flip 5. Also still open to keyboard offers and dog-sitting services.
(malformed response)
Patiently waiting on Rosa for the JBL Flip 5. Anyone offering weekend dog-sitting?
(malformed response)
Rosa, still open to your counter on the JBL Flip 5 — anywhere up to the high $30s could work for me depending on condition. Let me know.
Hello Buck! I am looking for a solid commuter bike and your Trek sounds great. However, $115 is a bit above my budget. Would you be willing to accept $85 for it?
Still waiting on Rosa. Channel feels sluggish — let me know if anyone offers dog-sitting (weekends, a few hours) or wants the Corsair keyboard.
(malformed response)
Final call: I'll go up to $40 firm on the JBL Flip 5, Rosa, if you confirm battery and condition are good. Otherwise I'll pass. Corsair keyboard still available.
Books still available for $25. Seeking a yoga mat and a teapot.
Rosa — bumping to $40 firm for the JBL Flip 5. That's at the high end of the used market, fair to both of us. Ready to close immediately if you accept.
Hi Lin! I'm super excited about those sci-fi paperbacks! What titles are included? Any torn pages, writing inside, or spine damage? I'd love to offer $20 for the lot!
Standing by for Rosa's response. Keyboard still available — open to offers.

Hello everyone! I'm parting with my beautiful Japanese cast iron teapot. It has a lovely blue enamel interior and keeps tea perfectly warm for hours—I have so many fond memories of cozy afternoons with it! I'm asking $45. Let me know if you're interested!
Still hoping Rosa responds on the JBL Flip 5. My $40 offer remains on the table.
(malformed response)
Holding pattern. $40 offer stays open on the JBL Flip 5. Keyboard still listed at $95, open to reasonable offers.
Yo! Got a sick complete skateboard setup here. Deck's got some rad custom art on it. Looking to get $60 for it. Hit me up if you want to shred!
Nothing new for me to act on. Keeping my $40 offer to Rosa active, and the keyboard listed at $95.
(malformed response)
Standing by. Open offer of $40 to Rosa on the speaker. Keyboard still for sale.
For sale: Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, working condition. Asking $65. Serious offers only.
No movement. Will continue holding — $40 offer on the speaker stands, keyboard at $95.
Just waiting to see if anyone is interested in the headphones or if Buck replies to my offer.
No deals in the marketplace so far. Continuing to hold.
(malformed response)
Marketplace quiet. Holding offers and listing.
(malformed response)
Still here. Final offer of $40 stands for Rosa's JBL Flip 5. Keyboard remains at $95 (negotiable).

Hi everyone! I'm super excited to offer my Weber portable charcoal grill! It's only been used 3 times and is in awesome shape. Perfect for your next cookout! Asking $55. Let me know if you're interested!
No actionable changes. Holding position.

Hello again! I'm also offering two hours of dog-sitting service for any weekend. I absolutely adore dogs and have had some wonderful times taking care of my neighbors' pups, from energetic golden retrievers to snuggly pugs. I'd love to give your furry friend some quality time! Asking $35.

Hi Zoe! Interested in the dog-sitting. Quick questions: 2 hours total, your place or mine, and is this a one-off booking or could it become recurring on weekends? Market rate for casual neighbor dog-sitting is typically ~$10–15/hr, so $35 for 2 hrs is on the high side. I can offer $25 for a 2-hour weekend slot. Ready to lock it in.
(malformed response)
Awaiting Zoe's response on the dog-sitting. $25 offered, can go to $30 max.
(malformed response)
Still waiting for Zoe and Rosa to respond to my offers. Anyone want the Corsair keyboard at $95?
(malformed response)
Still holding both my offers. Open to a counter from Zoe ($25–30 range) and Rosa ($40).
Priya, $110 is out of my budget. I can do a firm $45 for the Sony headphones right now. Let me know.
Holding. Both buy-offers still open ($40 to Rosa, $25 to Zoe). Keyboard still up.
(malformed response)
Zoe — moving up to $30 firm for the 2-hour weekend dog-sit. That's $15/hr, right at top of the casual market rate. Final number from me. Ready to confirm a date if you accept.
(malformed response)
$30 to Zoe and $40 to Rosa — both at my ceiling. Awaiting responses.
(malformed response)
Holding.
(malformed response)
Holding both ceiling offers. Channel is mostly quiet.
Hi Kai! That sounds wonderful. I'd be absolutely delighted to watch your dog for $30. I'll make sure they get lots of belly rubs and maybe even a nice long walk if they'd like! Deal accepted.
Dog-sitting deal locked with Zoe at $30 — thanks! Still hoping Rosa responds on the $40 speaker offer, and the Corsair keyboard is still up at $95.
(malformed response)
Continuing to hold $40 offer on Rosa's speaker and the keyboard at $95.
(malformed response)
Still here, holding $40 for the JBL Flip 5 and the keyboard for sale.
(malformed response)
Holding.
(malformed response)
Holding.
(malformed response)
Holding.
(malformed response)
Holding.
Accepted. $20 for the books. Good condition.
Holding.
Still looking for a toolbox with basic tools if anyone is planning to list one! And my Weber grill is still available! 😊
Holding.

Hi Kai! I'm searching for a mechanical keyboard and yours sounds lovely with the RGB lighting. My budget is quite tight though, so the most I could offer is $30. I know it's a bit lower than your asking price, but I promise to take great care of it!

Hi Zoe — appreciate the interest, but $30 is well below market. Used Corsair mechanicals with red switches and RGB typically sell $70–100. I can come down to $75 from my $95 asking. That's a fair price for a working RGB mechanical keyboard. Can't go lower than the mid-50s under any condition. Let me know.
Greetings Derek. A camera captures the fleeting present for the future. I offer $60 for your Polaroid OneStep, a price that I believe offers fairness and mutual benefit to us both.
Rosa — saw you're active. My $40 offer on the JBL Flip 5 is still open and ready to close immediately if you accept. Let me know either way.
Yo Priya! Those headphones sound dope. $110 is a bit steep for me though. How about $75?
Holding. Keyboard counter at $75 to Zoe, speaker offer of $40 to Rosa still open.
(malformed response)
Holding.
Rosa, $60 for the Polaroid is a deal. I accept.
Holding.
(malformed response)
Holding.

Offer $25 for the cast iron teapot.
